external.description:
We are announcing improved bulk delete user experience in Microsoft Dataverse. This feature will reach general availability by June 4, 2026.

**How does this affect me?**
This feature provides enhanced bulk delete with an improved error handling experience and solution aware configuration support, delivering a more consistent, reliable, and enterprise‑ready data cleanup workflow.

Key improvements include:

  * **Actionable error insights:** Clear job, record-level errors and intuitive UI helps admins quickly identify issues, reduce reruns, and resolve jobs faster.
  * **Solution-aware bulk delete:** Easily move delete configurations across environments with consistent behavior and reduced risk of misconfiguration.
  * **High-throughput delete API for Sandbox:** Accelerates sandbox deletion by bypassing the SDK pipeline and using the cascade engine directly.



**What action do I need to take?**
This message is for awareness, and no action is required.

If you would like more information on this feature, please visit:

  * Improve bulk delete user experience
  * Error Handling - Bulk delete
  * Solution-aware - Bulk delete
  * Sandbox fast delete - Bulk delete
external.title: MC1311990: Microsoft Dataverse – Improvements to bulk delete user experience

record.text: Microsoft 365 Backup now supports department billing, allowing admins to create up to 50 billing policies by department, geography, or unit, with delegated control via RBAC. Available to new customers from mid-May 2026; existing customers will get it later this year with no immediate changes.

external.description:
**[Introduction]**

Department billing for Microsoft 365 Backup allows administrators to configure backups by granular scopes such as departments, geographic locations, or member firms. With this feature, admins can break down backup consumption to multiple Azure subscriptions and delegate administrative control within departments for Microsoft 365 Backup.

This message is associated with Microsoft 365 Roadmap ID 506744.

**[When this will happen:]**

General Availability (Worldwide): Rollout completed in **mid-May 2026**.

**[How this affects your organization:]**

**Who is affected:**

  * Organizations newly onboarding to Microsoft 365 Backup
  * Microsoft 365 administrators managing Microsoft 365 Backup and Azure subscriptions



**What will happen:**

**For new Microsoft 365 Backup customers:**

  * Department billing is available during onboarding.
  * Admins can create multiple billing policies.
  * Admins can create up to 50 billing policies and associate different **Azure subscriptions to backup**.
  * Backup scopes can be defined based on customer needs such as by **department, geography, or organizational unit**.
  * Department-specific backup administrators can restrict control of their backups using **Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)**.



**For existing Microsoft 365 Backup customers:**

  * Departmental billing is not currently available to existing customers but will be made available later this year.
  * There is no change to the current billing or backup experience until the feature is enabled in the tenant.
  * Once departmental billing is enabled, admins can configure departmental billing using the same model available to new customers.
  * No admin action is required to receive the feature.



**[What you can do to prepare:]**

  * No action is required for existing Microsoft 365 Backup customers.
  * New customers onboarding to Microsoft 365 Backup can review billing policies, plan Azure subscription mapping, and assign RBAC roles for departmental administration.



**Learn more:** Manage consumption and invoices for Microsoft 365 Backup | Microsoft Learn

**[Compliance considerations:]**

No compliance considerations identified, review as appropriate for your organization.
external.title: MC1311976: Department billing for Microsoft 365 Backup

"Bolsonaro apresenta quadro persistente de instabilidade do equilíbrio corporal, diz relatório médico"

Link sem paywall ⬇️

external.description:
O ex-presidente Jair Bolsonaro apresenta um quadro persistente e inalterado de instabilidade do equilíbrio corporal, segundo relatório médico enviado ao Supremo Tribunal Federal (STF) na última sexta-feira. Bolsonaro está em prisão domiciliar após passar por uma cirurgia no ombro e após um quadro de pneumonia.
Conforme o relatório, o ex-presidente também apresentou "quadros recorrentes e persistentes de soluços nos últimos dias, com considerável melhora e estabilização após ajuste terapêutico". Ele está fazendo fisioterapia diariamente e usando tipoia para imobilização parcial do membro superior direito.
Bolsonaro cumpre pena após ter sido condenado pelo STF por tentativa de golpe de Estado. Ele está em prisão domiciliar desde o fim de março, após ter sido internado anteriormente para tratar uma broncopneumonia. Depois, ele foi internado novamente para fazer uma cirurgia no ombro. O procedimento durou cerca de cinco horas, incluindo o pré-operatório. Ele ocorreu sem intercorrências.
Na prisão domiciliar, Bolsonaro deve usar tornozeleira durante todo o período da domiciliar. O descumprimento das regras pode levar à revogação da medida e ao retorno ao regime anterior. Ele também está proibido de utilizar celular, telefone ou qualquer meio de comunicação, direta ou indireta, e não pode acessar redes sociais nem gravar ou divulgar vídeos e áudios, ainda que por intermédio de terceiros.
external.title: Bolsonaro apresenta quadro persistente de instabilidade do equilíbrio corporal, diz relatório médico

external.description: Back in 2016, Marco Gutiérrez, the Mexican-born founder of Latinos for Trump, issued an ominous warning to the US. “My culture is a very dominant culture,” he said on MSNBC. “It is imposing and it’s causing problems. If you don’t do something about it, you’re going to have taco trucks on every corner.” A decade later, I regret to inform you there is not a taco truck on every corner. But I am here to issue my own ominous warning about the takeover of America: not by immigrant culture but by AI culture. To echo Gutiérrez: it is imposing and it’s causing problems. And if we don’t do something about it, we’re going to have datacenters on every corner. I’m not some sort of data-hater, OK? Datacenters – physical facilities housing storage systems, servers and network devices – are a critical part of powering the internet; if they disappeared, the modern world would cease to function. The banking system would collapse; you wouldn’t be able to stream Netflix, go on social media, or (most importantly) read the Guardian online. But while we obviously need datacenters, the AI boom, and the enormous amounts of computing power it requires, has caused their...

external.description: For the pregnant mothers of Madudumizi, a remote village in the Kilosa District of Tanzania, everything changed when a brand new clinic, complete with a new deep borehole providing clean water on tap, opened. “Before, we had to walk several hours to the next village to the clinic, with the journey including a river crossing that could be dangerous,” explains Salma, a pregnant mother who has three other children aged 24, two and five months. Mothers previously died due to the length of the journey, she adds, while others died traversing the river, which becomes violent in the rainy season. The clinic was built with funds from international children’s charity World Vision, and forms part of a 20-year development programme aiming to transform the lives of 27,000 people across 13 villages in the region, with interventions across everything from health and nutrition, to water access and education. The programme, called “Ulaya”, is itself just a glimpse of World Vision’s overall presence in Tanzania, where last year the NGO spent some $48m (£35m) – raised through a combination of child sponsorships, donations, and government grants – to target some three million children across the country. Tanzania is a rapidly developing country,...
external.title: How the climate crisis brutally compromises aid to Tanzania: 'It impacts everything'

external.description: Ukraine struck several Russian military targets this week, including a Be-200 amphibious aircraft, President Volodymyr Zelensky said on May 16, publishing footage of the attacks. The strikes are part of Kyiv's broader campaign targeting Russian military infrastructure deep behind the enemy lines as Ukraine continues to expand its long-range strike capabilities. While Zelensky did not specify when the attack on the aircraft occurred, Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces said the aircraft was hit on May 15 in Russia's southern Krasnodar Krai. The Beriev Be-200 is a twin-engine amphibious aircraft designed for firefighting, search-and-rescue, and maritime patrol missions. Capable of taking off and landing both on runways and water, it is one of the most recognizable aircraft in its class. Zelensky said the targets struck this week also included a Kamov Ka-27 helicopter, a dry cargo ship carrying ammunition, a Pantsir-S1 anti-aircraft missile and gun system, a Tor anti-aircraft missile system, a "Redut-2US" communications system, and drones. "Our long-range sanctions also struck Russian oil industry facilities and ships. Distances traversed: nearly 1,000 kilometers (620 miles) from the line of contact," Zelensky said. "These are entirely justified responses to what the Russians are doing."...
external.title: 'Justified response' - Zelensky releases footage of Ukrainian strikes on Russian aircraft, other targets deep behind enemy lines

images.alt:
Der Verlag Dokico bringt den Romance-Manga »Inkya Gyaru Demo Ikigaritai!« von Tsukiko Kashiwagi nach Deutschland! Band 1 erscheint nach aktueller Planung voraussichtlich im ersten Quartal 2027. Neben der regulären Ausgabe erscheint auch eine Limited Edition mit Acrylaufsteller.

Die Reihe erscheint seit November 2022 im »Comic Yuri Hime« Magazine von Ichijinsha und umfasst bislang 3 Bände. Eine englische Übersetzung ist bislang nicht erhältlich.

📜 Beschreibung (Dokico)》
Ichiko und Kuran gehören zum Club für Popkulturforschung.
Sie lieben alles, was süß ist, und stehen auf Popkultur, sind aber eher zurückhaltend und haben Schwierigkeiten im Umgang mit anderen.
Auch heute sprechen die beiden wieder über ihre Lieblingsdinge, meckern über Dinge, die sie nicht mögen, und gehen los, um die neuesten trendigen Desserts zu probieren.

record.text: Mit einem Teaser gab das Produktiosstudio Kyoto Animation bekannt, dass der Manga »The Credits Roll Into the Sea (Umi ga Hashiru Endroll)« von John Tarachine einen Anime-Film erhält. Dieser soll im laufe des nächsten Jahres 2027 in den japanischen Kinos erscheinen.

images.alt:
Die Reihe lief von Oktober 2020 bis  im Magazine »Mystery Bonita« von Akita Shoten und umfasst insgesamt 9 Bände. Der 9 Band ist heute in Japan erschienen. Dark Horse veröffentlicht den Manga auf Englisch, der erste Band erscheint am 7. Juli 2026.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Nach dem Tod ihres Mannes lebt die 65-jährige Umiko in einer Stille, die kaum noch Platz für Neues lässt. Erst ein Kinobesuch nach vielen Jahren bringt etwas in ihr zum Klingen. Dort begegnet sie dem Filmstudenten Kai, der bemerkt, wie aufmerksam sie nicht nur den Film, sondern auch die Reaktionen des Publikums beobachtet. Als er sie fragt, ob sie selbst Filme machen möchte, wird Umiko klar, dass in ihr ein Wunsch geschlummert hat, dem sie nie nachgegangen ist.

Recent photos and videos from President Trump's May 2026 visit to Beijing (including the welcome ceremony at the Great Hall of the People and meetings at Zhongnanhai) show a standard diplomatic handshake and interactions—no bowing by Trump. Similar fakes have circulated before, like old AI images of Putin bowing to or kissing Xi's hand. 流量固然诱人，健康的网络生态才更加可贵。现在的我，在按下发送键之前会思考得更深一点。我会仔细甄别梗图背后的底色，去寻找那些能跨越群体隔阂、真正触动人心的幽默。我宁愿多发几张让人会心一笑的日常吐槽，也要把披着搞笑外衣的恶意拒之门外。在这个情绪极易失控的时代，克制自己制造喧嚣的欲望，保留一份真诚与温柔，才是一个分享者最该坚守的底线。
（很抱歉，我使用了 Gemini 来润色文字）

原推文 https://x.com/smiroyama/status/2055344658344284568 (5/5)
那一刻我非常清醒地认识到，这种建立在他人丑态或激烈冲突之上的狂欢，完全违背了我分享内容的初衷。我并不渴望成为一个只会机械投喂焦虑和对立情绪的流量机器。我的账号应该是一个让人感到轻松、安全且能获得共鸣的角落。大家在这里相遇，本就带着跨越圈层交流的善意。如果为了追求冰冷的点赞数，肆意利用敏感议题挑起争端，甚至迎合某种极端的偏见，那无疑是对这份信任的背叛。 (4/5)

RT @smiroyama: 很多时候，我刷到能让推友图一乐的梗图就会产生分享的冲动。但在按下发送键前，我总会习惯性地停顿一下，在脑海里盘算几个问题：这张图会收到怎样的反馈？它究竟能带来多大的曝光量？

曾听人传授过所谓的“流量密码”，说发布带有对立色彩的内容最容易吸引眼球，比如性别、地域、性向的冲突，哪怕是操作系统的阵营争论也能火一把。观察推特上那些主流的梗图大号，他们确实深谙此道，尤其偏爱炒作男女话题。把争议抛给网友围观，轻轻松松就能收获上千个赞。 (1/5)

完全なるビギナーのやり方なので、皆さんどうしているのか気になる。

いきなりやらせず、
・ある程度細かく作業を区切る
・方針を議論する
・やったことを説明させる機会を設ける
などをすると大分管理しやすいように感じている。

- 良さそうなら書かせる。テストも書かせる。書いた内容を説明させる。内容理解のためにこちらが解くべき簡単なクイズを作らせてもよい
 - レビューする。いまいちなら修正を要求する。自分では書かない
 - 自分で動かす。使い勝手や内容に問題を感じれば修正を要求する

などを繰り返す感じでやっている。なんかもう大学院生くらいの研究者を雇って、議論しながら働かせて感じに近い。

record.text: Mick Jagger and Eric Clapton win battle to stop 29-storey block being built by Thames

external.description:
Planning inspector backs council’s rejection of development which was ‘not exemplary, extraordinary, remarkable or distinctive, just tall’

Celebrities including Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger have defeated plans to build a 29-storey tower on the banks of the River Thames.

Jagger, along with fellow rockstar Eric Clapton, actor Felicity Kendal and comic Harry Hill, fought the developer Rockwell Property for two years over its plan to erect a 100-metre tower next to Battersea Bridge. If the tower had been built on the south bank of the Thames in south-west London, it would have rivalled the heights of the famous chimneys on Battersea power station. Continue reading...
